purpose: Committed deterministic 100-document realistic corpus for exercising high-volume I-9 fixture generation and validation without live AI calls.

intentionallyMissing.reason: Nina does not provide a phone number in the committed fixture.
intentionallyMissing.expectedBehavior: Leave the telephone field blank; do not guess or synthesize a phone number.

intentionallyMissing.reason: Nina uses the U.S. citizen I-9 path, so no USCIS A-number applies.
intentionallyMissing.expectedBehavior: Leave the alien registration number field blank for this fixture.

intentionallyMissing.reason: Nina uses the U.S. citizen I-9 path, so no I-94 number applies.
intentionallyMissing.expectedBehavior: Leave the I-94 admission number field blank for this fixture.

intentionallyMissing.reason: Nina uses the U.S. citizen I-9 path, so no foreign passport number applies.
intentionallyMissing.expectedBehavior: Leave the foreign passport number field blank for this fixture.
